title: Request logs and assessment logs tables deprecated
body: The `payload_request_logs` and `payload_assessment_logs` tables are deprecated. Starting November 1, 2025, newly deployed agents won't have these tables. Starting November 15, 2025, existing tables won't be populated with new data. Upgrade to MLflow 3 for real-time tracing or use the provided views. See [Agent inference tables: Request and assessment logs (deprecated)](/aws/en/agents/agent-framework/request-assessment-logs).

ref_links.text: Agent inference tables: Request and assessment logs (deprecated)
